items.title: Yankees Place Carlos Rodón On IL With Elbow Inflammation
items.summary: The Yankees announced a series of roster moves today. Infielder Ryan McMahon and outfielder Trent Grisham have each been reinstated from the ten-day injured list. In corresponding moves, infielder/outfielder Oswaldo Cabrera has been optioned to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre and left-hander Carlos Rodón has been placed on the 15-day injured list with elbow inflammation, retroactive to June […]

items.title: Yankees Sequence of the Week: Yovanny Cruz (6/30)
items.summary: There’s really no way to sugarcoat the way the Yankees are playing right now. The offense is impotent, the starting pitching has been suspect, and the defense unacceptable.
